hyperedges.label: API functions operating on the shared Shares data structure
example.ts functions form a full walkthrough of the public API
Ordering predicates implemented on top of compareAmounts
Shares binary mutation operations (add/subtract/multiply) share the normalize-then-construct pattern
'n'-suffix bigint JSON serialization convention implemented independently in Shares.toJSON and JSONbigint helpers
Test suites covering the Shares mutation API (add/subtract/multiply)

nodes.label: Rationale: Shares has no instrument identity field; caller tracks instrument (e.g. Record<ISIN, Shares>)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: shares has no instrument identity field; caller tracks instrument (e.g. record<isin, shares>)

nodes.label: Rationale: binary ops normalize scale first via normalizeScale before operating on amounts
nodes.norm_label: rationale: binary ops normalize scale first via normalizescale before operating on amounts

nodes.label: Rationale: assertions go through helpers/assert.ts using message constants from src/messages.ts
nodes.norm_label: rationale: assertions go through helpers/assert.ts using message constants from src/messages.ts

nodes.label: Rationale: floor/ceil round amount to nearest whole share while preserving scale, correcting bigint truncation-toward-zero for negatives
nodes.norm_label: rationale: floor/ceil round amount to nearest whole share while preserving scale, correcting bigint truncation-toward-zero for negatives

nodes.label: Rationale: multiply never loses precision, scale only grows (scale + multiplierScale)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: multiply never loses precision, scale only grows (scale + multiplierscale)

nodes.label: Scope: NAV/valuation, allocate, dangerDivide/dangerRound deliberately not implemented yet
nodes.norm_label: scope: nav/valuation, allocate, dangerdivide/dangerround deliberately not implemented yet

nodes.label: InstrumentId branded type + Record<ISIN, Shares> tracking pattern
nodes.norm_label: instrumentid branded type + record<isin, shares> tracking pattern
